# HC IX.2 — Singularity / Horizon Conjugation Images & Video README
**Status:** companion asset note
**Format:** Markdown
**Scope:** HC IX.2 publication packet

## Purpose
This file records the external image / video asset links associated with the **Singularity / Horizon Conjugation** visual layer for HC IX.2.

These links are intended for inclusion, reference, or later curation in relation to:

- the HC IX.2 paper
- the visual legend
- the image and motion brief
- any future reviewer-facing or field-facing visual surfaces

## Asset links

### Link 2

## Suggested usage
These assets may be used to support:

- still-image selection for HC IX.2
- motion / video companion work
- reviewer-safe visual framing
- field-facing orientation materials
- later HC X visual continuity if appropriate

## Relation to the current packet
This README should be read alongside:

## Editorial note
These links are preserved here as part of the working publication surface so that visual provenance is not lost during release preparation.

## Closing line
The visual layer belongs to the same rung of witness: singularity, horizon, conjugation, traversal, and lawful return.
